items.title: Crystal 1.0 anniversary 5 years AMA
items.author: Crystal Programming Language
items.content:
<article>The release of Crystal 1.0 was 5 years ago. Meet the Core Team and community members looking back at that milestone, what happened since then, and what's coming next.

https://forum.crystal-lang.org/t/5-years-anniversary-of-crystal-1-0/8801</article>
